title: Vanilla Live
description: Make your game look like the Minecraft Live Mob Votes!
body:
--- ## 📖 Description **Vanilla Live** is a resource pack that brings the **Minecraft Live Mob Vote visual style** into normal gameplay. Inspired by the official textures used on the **Bedrock Mob Vote servers**, this pack aims to recreate that clean, colorful, and slightly stylized look while remaining faithful to Vanilla Minecraft. Some textures are taken directly from the **official Bedrock Mob Vote servers**, while others have been **carefully recreated and extended by me** to fill in the gaps, ensuring a consistent look across the game. This pack is perfect for players who love the look of the Minecraft Live events and Mob Votes and want that same visuals in survival or creative gameplay. --- ## 🧩 Optional Resource Packs For players who enjoy the **Minecraft Live / promotional art style**, these resource packs also pair well with **Vanilla Live** and offer a similar visual experience: * **[Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones)** A clean and simplified resource pack inspired by Minecraft’s promotional artwork and trailers, focusing on smooth colors and minimal detail. * **[Plastic Texture Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/plastic-texture-pack)** Featuring bright colors and a toy-like aesthetic that closely matches the Minecraft Live visual style. --- ## ⚙️ Compatibility * ✅ Works with **Minecraft 1.21.x** and newer. * 🧱 Compatible with both **vanilla** and **modded** installations. --- ## 📦 Installation 1. Download the resource pack. 2. Place it in your `resourcepacks/` folder. 3. Enable it in Minecraft’s Resource Packs menu. 4. Load a world and enjoy the **Minecraft Live look**! --- ## 🤝 Support * 💬 Want to suggest a texture to be made next, give feedback, or follow development? Join the [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/P45YYnRmpQ) * 🐞 Report bugs/issues on [Codeberg](https://codeberg.org/Nostalgica-Reverie/Vanilla-Live) ---
This resource pack uses textures from the official Minecraft 2022 Mob Vote Event server with updated textures created by Pigzone.
